title: Daily Journal Prompt Generator
description: Generate thoughtful daily journal prompts for self-reflection. Different prompt each day — creative, introspective, and growth-oriented.
prompt: Generate a unique daily journal prompt for self-reflection. Vary between: gratitude, goal-setting, emotional check-in, creative thinking, problem-solving. Keep it under 30 words. Make it specific enough to spark writing but open enough for personal interpretation.

title: Bug Report Formatter
description: Format messy bug descriptions into professional bug reports with steps to reproduce, expected vs actual behavior, and environment details.
prompt:
Format bug descriptions into structured reports:

## Summary
One-line description

## Steps to Reproduce
1. ...
2. ...

## Expected Behavior
What should happen

## Actual Behavior
What actually happens

## Environment
- OS: 
- Browser: 
- Version: 

## Screenshots/Logs
[attach if available]

title: Git Commit Message Generator
description: Write conventional commit messages from git diffs. Follows conventional commits spec with type, scope, and description.
prompt:
Generate git commit messages following conventional commits:

Format: <type>(<scope>): <description>

Types: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, perf, test, chore, ci

Rules:
- Description under 72 chars
- Imperative mood ("add" not "added")
- No period at end
- Include breaking changes with BREAKING CHANGE: footer
